title: Om Gam Ganapataye Namah
meaning: Salutations to Ganesha, remover of obstacles. A bija invocation to clear the way before beginning.

title: Om Shri Ganeshaya Namah
meaning: Salutations to revered Ganesha. A simple bow before stepping out into the day.

title: Vakratunda Mahakaya
primary_text:
वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ।
निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा॥
transliteration:
Vakratuṇḍa mahākāya sūryakoṭi samaprabha,
nirvighnaṃ kuru me deva sarvakāryeṣu sarvadā.
meaning: O curved-trunk, mighty one, radiant as countless suns — make all my endeavours free of obstacles, always.

title: Om Namah Shivaya
meaning: I bow to Shiva, the auspicious one. The five-syllable mantra of surrender and stillness.

title: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra
primary_text:
ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम्।
उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान्मृत्योर्मुक्षीय मामृतात्॥
transliteration:
Oṃ tryambakaṃ yajāmahe sugandhiṃ puṣṭivardhanam,
urvārukam iva bandhanān mṛtyor mukṣīya māmṛtāt.
meaning: We worship the three-eyed one who nourishes all. As a ripe cucumber loosens from its stem, free us from death — not from immortality.

title: Om Namo Narayanaya
meaning: I bow to Narayana, the refuge of all beings. The eight-syllable mantra of trust.

title: Shantakaram Bhujagashayanam
primary_text:
शान्ताकारं भुजगशयनं पद्मनाभं सुरेशं
विश्वाधारं गगनसदृशं मेघवर्णं शुभाङ्गम्॥
transliteration:
Śāntākāraṃ bhujagaśayanaṃ padmanābhaṃ sureśaṃ
viśvādhāraṃ gaganasadṛśaṃ meghavarṇaṃ śubhāṅgam.
meaning: Serene of form, resting on the serpent, lotus-naveled lord of the gods — support of the universe, vast as the sky.

title: Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevaya
meaning: I bow to Bhagavan Vasudeva (Krishna). The twelve-syllable mantra of loving remembrance.

title: Hare Krishna Maha Mantra
primary_text:
हरे कृष्ण हरे कृष्ण कृष्ण कृष्ण हरे हरे।
हरे राम हरे राम राम राम हरे हरे॥
transliteration:
Hare Kṛṣṇa Hare Kṛṣṇa, Kṛṣṇa Kṛṣṇa Hare Hare,
Hare Rāma Hare Rāma, Rāma Rāma Hare Hare.
meaning: A calling of the divine names of Krishna and Rama — the great mantra of remembrance.

title: Om Hanumate Namah
meaning: Salutations to Hanuman, the fearless protector. A bow for courage on the road.

title: Manojavam Marutatulyavegam
primary_text:
मनोजवं मारुततुल्यवेगं जितेन्द्रियं बुद्धिमतां वरिष्ठम्।
वातात्मजं वानरयूथमुख्यं श्रीरामदूतं शरणं प्रपद्ये॥
transliteration:
Manojavaṃ mārutatulyavegaṃ jitendriyaṃ buddhimatāṃ variṣṭham,
vātātmajaṃ vānarayūthamukhyaṃ śrīrāmadūtaṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadye.
meaning: Swift as thought, fleet as the wind, master of the senses, wisest of the wise — to the son of the wind, Rama's messenger, I take refuge.

title: Om Aim Saraswatyai Namah
meaning: Salutations to Saraswati, goddess of speech and learning. A bija invocation for clear thought.

title: Om Shreem Mahalakshmyai Namah
meaning: Salutations to Mahalakshmi, source of abundance and grace. A bija invocation for steady well-being.

title: Om Dum Durgayai Namah
meaning: Salutations to Durga, the fierce and guarding mother. A bija invocation for protection.

title: Navarna Mantra
primary_text: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे
transliteration: Oṃ Aiṃ Hrīṃ Klīṃ Cāmuṇḍāyai Vicce
meaning: The nine-syllable mantra of the Devi, invoking her threefold power of will, knowledge, and action.

title: Gayatri Mantra
primary_text:
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः।
तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि।
धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्॥
transliteration:
Oṃ bhūr bhuvaḥ svaḥ,
tat savitur vareṇyaṃ bhargo devasya dhīmahi,
dhiyo yo naḥ pracodayāt.
meaning: We meditate on the radiant glory of the divine Savitr (the sun); may it illumine our minds.

title: Om Suryaya Namah
meaning: Salutations to Surya, the sun. A bow to light at the start of the day.

title: Om Shanti Shanti Shanti
meaning: Peace, peace, peace — invoked threefold for body, mind, and spirit.

title: Asato Ma Sad Gamaya
primary_text:
असतो मा सद्गमय।
तमसो मा ज्योतिर्गमय।
मृत्योर्मा अमृतं गमय॥
transliteration:
Asato mā sad gamaya,
tamaso mā jyotir gamaya,
mṛtyor mā amṛtaṃ gamaya.
meaning: Lead me from the unreal to the real, from darkness to light, from death to immortality.

title: Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah
primary_text:
सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः।
सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु मा कश्चिद्दुःखभाग्भवेत्॥
transliteration:
Sarve bhavantu sukhinaḥ sarve santu nirāmayāḥ,
sarve bhadrāṇi paśyantu mā kaścid duḥkhabhāg bhavet.
meaning: May all be happy, may all be free from illness, may all see what is good, may none suffer.

title: Lokah Samastah Sukhino Bhavantu
meaning: May all beings everywhere be happy and free. A closing wish of goodwill.

title: Om Saha Navavatu
primary_text:
ॐ सह नाववतु। सह नौ भुनक्तु।
सह वीर्यं करवावहै।
तेजस्वि नावधीतमस्तु मा विद्विषावहै॥
transliteration:
Oṃ saha nāv avatu, saha nau bhunaktu,
saha vīryaṃ karavāvahai,
tejasvi nāv adhītam astu mā vidviṣāvahai.
meaning: May we be protected together, nourished together; may we work together with vigour; may our study be radiant; may we not quarrel.
